testCases.title: Verify that API prevents duplicate Employee ID creation

steps.action: Navigate to url "https://hr.quality-matrix.us/web/index.php/auth/login" Ã¢â€ â€™ Configured application URL should open | Enter username "adminhrqa" and password "Adminhrqa@321" Ã¢â€ â€™ Configured credentials should be entered successfully | Send POST request to employee creation endpoint with firstName "Lisa", lastName "Anderson", employeeId "EMP011" Ã¢â€ â€™ First employee record should be created successfully | Send another POST request with firstName "Mark", lastName "Taylor", same employeeId "EMP011" Ã¢â€ â€™ Duplicate Employee ID request should be sent | Verify API response status code is 409 and response contains conflict error message Ã¢â€ â€™ API should reject duplicate Employee ID
